description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Taxi service for concert at Kai Tak Sports Park
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德體育園演唱會的士服務

2025-05-13T23:12:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) today (May 13) said that it is the peak dispersal period of concert at Kai Tak Sports Park, the passenger queue for taxi service at the Sung Wong Toi Road Taxi Pick-up/Drop-off Area is relatively long and it would take some time for boarding the taxis. Spectators are advised to use the MTR to leave the Kai Tak Sports Park. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-05-13T23:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署今日(五月十三日）表示現時為啟德體育園演唱會散場人流高峰時段，宋皇臺道的士上落客區現時輪候人數較多，輪候時間會較長。觀眾請選擇乘搭港鐵離開啟德體育園。 觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

2025-05-14T18:26:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road sections are busy:
Hong Kong Island:
– Connaught Road Central flyover (Kennedy Town bound)
– Connaught Road West flyover (Kennedy Town bound)

New Territories:
– Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2025-05-14T18:26:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
香港島:
–干諾道中天橋(往堅尼地城方向)
–干諾道西天橋(往堅尼地城方向)

新界:
–大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2025-05-14T19:34:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road section is busy:
New Territories:
– Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound)
Motorists passing through the above road section are advised to drive with utmost care and patience. 
.  The following road sections have resumed normal:
Hong Kong Island:
– Connaught Road Central flyover (Kennedy Town bound)
– Connaught Road West flyover (Kennedy Town bound).
2025-05-14T19:34:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
新界:
–大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。
。  以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
香港島:
–干諾道中天橋(往堅尼地城方向)
–干諾道西天橋(往堅尼地城方向)。

2025-05-14T18:43:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) near Kwai Chung Park is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-14T18:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，荃灣路(往屯門公路方向)近葵涌公園的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-14T19:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) near Kwai Chung Park which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-14T19:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的荃灣路(往屯門公路方向)近葵涌公園的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-14T18:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Tai Po bound) near Hong Kong Science Park which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.   Citizens please take note KMB's and LWB's services via Tolo Highway (Tai Po bound) have been affected. Citizens please consider using MTR services.
2025-05-14T18:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的吐露港公路(往大埔方向)近香港科學園的部份行車線現已解封。車龍有待消散。  市⺠請留意途經吐露港公路(往⼤埔⽅向)的九巴、⿓運巴⼠服務會受影響。市⺠請考慮使⽤港鐵服務。

2025-05-14T19:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Services of KMB and LWB which were affected by the traffic accident at Tolo Highway (Tai Po bound) near Hong Kong Science Park have gradually resumed normal.
2025-05-14T19:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因位於吐露港公路(往大埔方向)近香港科學園的交通意外而受影響的九巴及⿓運巴⼠服務已陸續回復正常。

2025-05-14T19:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to obstacles on road , part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Road (Tseung Kwan O Tunnel bound) near Hong Wah Court is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Tseung Kwan O Road (Tseung Kwan O Tunnel bound) ends at Kwun Tong Bypass near Laguna City. Traffic is congested now.
2025-05-14T19:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因路面有障礙物，將軍澳道(往將軍澳隧道方向)近康華苑的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在將軍澳道(往將軍澳隧道方向)的車龍龍尾已到觀塘繞道近麗港城。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2025-05-14T19:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Road (Tseung Kwan O Tunnel bound) near Hong Wah Court which was closed due to obstacles on road is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-14T19:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因路面有障礙物而封閉的將軍澳道(往將軍澳隧道方向)近康華苑的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-05-16T12:28:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tuen Mun Town Centre which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-05-16T12:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近屯門市中心的部份行車線現已解封。
